title: cyperus haspan var. sphaerospermoides
intro: Cyperus haspan var. sphaerospermoides, also known as Sphaerospermoid Cyperus, is a variant of the Cyperus haspan plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cyperus haspan var. sphaerospermoides include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the removal of excess fluids from the body. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
